name: python3-pyelftools
title: python3-pyelftools
summary: pure-python3 library for parsing ELF and DWARF
description:
pure-python3 library for parsing ELF and DWARF
pyelftools is a pure-Python library for parsing and analyzing ELF
files and DWARF debugging information. It can be used to query
information about compiled binaries and libraries from your Python
code.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pyelftools because pure-python3 library for parsing ELF and DWARF.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pyelftools as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pyelftools with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pyelftools --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
